chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-569 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 17-10-2024 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen, APG. **** Heard learned counsel for applicant and APG and perused the impugned order. From perusal of impugned order, it reflects that no illegality or infirmity has been committed by the trial Court. No case for any interference of this Court is made out. Accordingly, instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed in limine. JUDGE Ahmad
